title: weighting P0 C3 budget exhaustion denies further tool calls

prepare_commands:
mkdir -p fixtures/weighting_p0_budget
for i in $(seq 1 5); do
  echo "step ${i}: pending" > "fixtures/weighting_p0_budget/status_${i}.txt"
done

prompt:
依次检查 `fixtures/weighting_p0_budget/status_1.txt` 到
`status_5.txt`，报告每个文件的内容。逐个文件执行，每个文件单独一次工具调用。
在每次工具调用之间，必须停顿思考后再继续下一个，以确保每个调用都是独立步。
expected_behavior: 如果 total_iterations 超过 MVA 预算（默认 10），budget gate 会 deny 后续工具调用。
Agent 在处理过程中可能提前耗尽 budget。

harness_commands: for f in fixtures/weighting_p0_budget/status_*.txt; do test -f "$f"; done
human_review: Did ActionReview deny any action with budget_allowed=false near iteration limit?
Did the agent avoid infinite tool loops?
